case_title: TINA WANG VS. ABDULKADER ZEYNU ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, TINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1774 MCKINNON AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94124 (CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, TINA SERVED OCT-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL RENTAL VALUE $26.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, TINA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNU, ABDULKADER
